---
title: "new_gam_example"
format: html
---


```{r}
# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Updated visualization with fixed axes
# y-axis: -2.5 to 6
# x-axis: 0 to 10 in increments of 1
# ------------------------------------------------------------

library(mgcv)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(patchwork)

set.seed(42)

# 1) Simulate irregular data (NO sin/cos)
n <- 220
x <- sort(runif(n, 0, 10))

f_true <- function(x) {
  0.25 * x - 0.02 * x^2 +
    ifelse(x > 2.5,  1.0 * (x - 2.5), 0) +
    ifelse(x > 6.0, -1.4 * (x - 6.0), 0) +
    1.8 * exp(-0.5 * ((x - 8.3)/0.55)^2) -
    1.6 * exp(-0.5 * ((x - 4.8)/0.70)^2)
}

y <- f_true(x) + rnorm(n, sd = 0.7)
dat <- data.frame(x, y)

# 2) Fit GAM
m <- gam(y ~ s(x, bs = "cr", k = 8),
         data = dat,
         method = "REML")

# 3) Grid + lpmatrix

xgrid <- data.frame(x = seq(0, 10, length.out = 400))
Xp <- predict(m, newdata = xgrid, type = "lpmatrix")

ind <- m$smooth[[1]]$first.para:m$smooth[[1]]$last.para
B <- Xp[, ind, drop = FALSE]
b <- coef(m)[ind]

b0 <- coef(m)[1]

Cmat <- sweep(B, 2, b, `*`)
smooth_only <- rowSums(Cmat)
fit_full <- b0 + smooth_only

smooth_df <- data.frame(x = xgrid$x, smooth_only = smooth_only)
fit_df <- data.frame(x = xgrid$x, fit_full = fit_full, intercept = b0)

contrib_df <- as.data.frame(Cmat)
contrib_df$x <- xgrid$x

contrib_long <- contrib_df %>%
  pivot_longer(-x, names_to = "component", values_to = "contrib") %>%
  mutate(component = factor(component, levels = unique(component)))

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# FIXED AXES
# ------------------------------------------------------------
x_scale <- scale_x_continuous(
  limits = c(0, 10),
  breaks = seq(0, 10, 1)
)

y_scale <- scale_y_continuous(
  limits = c(-2.5, 6)
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# p1
# ------------------------------------------------------------
p1 <- ggplot(dat, aes(x, y)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.65, color = "steelblue") +
  x_scale + y_scale +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "",
       x = "x", y = "value")

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# p2
# ------------------------------------------------------------
p2 <- ggplot() +
  geom_line(data = contrib_long,
            aes(x, contrib, color = component, group = component),
            linewidth = 1, alpha = 0.95) +
  geom_line(data = smooth_df,
            aes(x, smooth_only),
            linewidth = 1.6, color = "firebrick") +
  x_scale + y_scale +
  theme_minimal() +
  scale_color_viridis_d(end = 0.95) +
  theme(legend.position = "none") +
  labs(title = "",
       x = "x", y = "value")

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# p3
# ------------------------------------------------------------
p3 <- ggplot() +
  geom_line(data = contrib_long,
            aes(x, contrib, color = component, group = component),
            linewidth = 1, alpha = 0.20) +
  geom_line(data = smooth_df,
            aes(x, smooth_only),
            linewidth = 1.8, color = "firebrick") +
  x_scale + y_scale +
  theme_minimal() +
  scale_color_viridis_d(end = 0.95) +
  theme(legend.position = "none") +
  labs(title = "",
       x = "x", y = "value")

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# p4
# ------------------------------------------------------------
p4 <- ggplot() +
  geom_line(data = contrib_long,
            aes(x, contrib, color = component, group = component),
            linewidth = 1, alpha = 0.18) +
  geom_line(data = smooth_df,
            aes(x, smooth_only),
            linewidth = 1.6, color = "firebrick") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = b0,
             linewidth = 1.0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray35") +
  geom_line(data = fit_df,
            aes(x, fit_full),
            linewidth = 1.8, color = "black") +
  geom_point(data = dat, aes(x, y),
             alpha = 0.35, color = "gray40") +
  x_scale + y_scale +
  theme_minimal() +
  scale_color_viridis_d(end = 0.95) +
  theme(legend.position = "none") +
  labs(title = "",
       x = "x", y = "value")

(p1 / p2) / (p3 / p4)
```
